scripts.build:clean: node -e "try { require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Cleaned .next'); } catch (e) { console.warn('Could not remove .next:', e.message); }" && next build
scripts.clean: node -e "try { require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Cleaned .next'); } catch (e) { console.warn('Could not remove .next:', e.message); }"
